# Slice intake (kickoff) — template

**Use for:** Starting a **bounded implementation** slice chat. Paste or adapt; keep answers short. **Control Tower** may pre-fill slice id and pointers.

---

## 1. Classification

- **Slice id / name:** <!-- e.g. Slice 5 — JSON export + confirmed import replace -->
- **Repo:** ClassPulse only (if not, stop — see [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md)).

## 2. Working mode

- **Lane:** Implementation (not Control Tower / not strategy-only).

## 3. Definition of done

- <!-- Observable outcomes, tests/docs if any -->

## 4. Non-goals

- <!-- Explicit out-of-scope items -->

## 5. Source-of-truth files

- <!-- e.g. DECISIONS.md D14, docs/contracts/..., SLICE_PLAN row -->

## 6. Risky assumptions

- <!-- What could invalidate the plan -->

## 7. Verification plan

- <!-- e.g. npm run typecheck, lint, test, build per docs/RUNBOOK_SanityChecks.md -->

## 8. Questions

- <!-- Or: No questions needed. -->

---

## Closeout (when slice completes)

Report back to Control Tower / PM using the **seven bullets** in [`docs/WORKFLOWS/CONTROL_TOWER.md`](../WORKFLOWS/CONTROL_TOWER.md#what-implementation-slice-chats-must-report-back). For meaningful runs: one receipt under `docs/ai/run_receipts/` + handoff alignment per [`docs/WORKFLOWS/AGENT_HANDOFF_STANDARD.md`](../WORKFLOWS/AGENT_HANDOFF_STANDARD.md).
